name: Hayate the Stormblade
dialogue: The storm doesn’t wait for you to be ready. Wind, thunder, and tempest — they strike first.
Can you stand in the eye and still fight?
preBattleLine: Lightning arcs between Hayate’s fingers. Thunder shakes the rafters.
postDefeatDialogue: Hayate sheathes his blade. The storm calms.
You stood in it. Akari is the last — she guards wisdom, and she shows no mercy.
